figures.caption: Table 2: Shared training hyper-parameters applied identically to all models on both datasets.
Table 7: Component-level ablation. Mini-ImageNet deltas are the primary result; CIFAR-10 bypass-regime deltas are shown in grey for comparison.

Figure 1: Architecture of the proposed Gated-SwinRMT variants. (a) Gated-SwinRMT-SWAT: sigmoid-based normalized attention with SwiGLU-gated values, balanced ALiBi positional bias, and multiplicative spatial decay γ|i−j| applied post-sigmoid. (b) GatedSwinRMT-Retention: softmax-normalized retention with additive log-decay mask Mij=|i−j| log γh applied pre-softmax, and a learned G1 sigmoid gate applied after local context enhancement (LCE) and before the output projection WO. Both variants share DWConv 3×3 positional encoding, LayerScale (γ1, γ2) with DropPath, an LCE module on V , adaptive window partitioning with optional cyclic shift, and convolutional patch merging. Best viewed in colour.
